data.content: Planning complete. Implement by renaming the action prompt command from Skill/SkillArgs/run_skill to Prompt/PromptArgs/run_prompt, preserving `kno skill <id>` as a hidden deprecated alias that emits exactly `warning: 'kno skill' is deprecated; use 'kno prompt'` to stderr. `src/run_commands.rs` is 489 lines, so prefer extracting prompt command logic to a small dedicated module if edits would push it over the 500-line limit. Leave managed `kno skills ...` behavior untouched. Update docs/skills prompt-command references, remove the TAXONOMY ambiguity note, add parser/dispatch/unit coverage for canonical prompt and deprecated alias, then verify with targeted tests, rg checks for `Commands::Skill`/`run_skill` and stale `kno skill` docs references, and `make sanity`.
